name: Rainbow Friends Survival FPS
description: Navigate tense encounters in a first-person perspective, using stealth and marksmanship to survive against colorful but hostile opponents. The game mixes tactical shooting with real-time evasion, challenging players to outmaneuver enemy AI within confined levels. Progressively tougher waves test reflexes and aim as you strive to endure each encounter in a vibrant yet eerie environment.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
